name: auto-share-folder-watcher
description: Watches configured folders and auto-shares new files to a chat channel as messages. Uses folder_config from file-upload-storage.

envVars.name: UPLOADS_DIR
envVars.description: Same as file-upload-storage — the base for watched folders

globals: global._syncWatchers (set to the return value from setup so the API can trigger re-sync)

postInstall: 1. No own DB schema — folder_config comes from file-upload-storage
2. In server.js after io is up:
3. Configure autoshare via PATCH /api/folders/[id] with { autoshareChannelId: X }
